title: EQ - Saved Custom EQ, reset defaults - returns to Bass, but leaves custom not saved
scenario: After creating and saving a custom EQ, performing a "Reset Defaults" from Device Settings reverts the EQ to the Bass preset and resets slider values to default instead of retaining custom settings.
steps: Create and save a custom EQ preset with specific slider values.
Observe the EQ preset and slider positions.
expected: The custom EQ preset should remain saved and selected, with slider values retaining the custom settings.
